Grep for game.scene.add(...) and scene.add(...) finds no production registration of either base. BasePlayableScene.js does not exist. Skip rationale is sound.

Verdict: PASS. Every CRITICAL and HIGH check is clean. The two MEDIUM checks (code quality, correct skips) are clean. One LOW item (unable to locally verify production tree-shaking) is non-blocking and surfaced as follow-up.
